name: Creamy Tofu Dressing
recipeIngredient: Juice of 1 Lemon plus a pinch
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tofu slices in a blender or food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Add remaining ingredients and only as much water as needed to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Process until smooth. Makes 2 cups. Food Exchange per serving: FREE; CAL: 9; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 1g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 1g; FAT: 1g; Approximately yields 32 servings (1 tablespoon each).
